expertise: Hook type accounts for 35% of ERI variance, competitive density inverse 25%, posting velocity 20%, thumbnail quality 20%. List hooks outperform question hooks in affiliate niches by 18%.
ERI predictions fail when: new hook format lacks historical data, platform algorithm shifts mid-campaign, competitive density spikes from viral competitor. Flag for human calibration.
